title: Project Assistance
description: Pairing, feature implementation, and code reviews for existing projects. I can jump into your repo and help ship milestones.
details: feature implementation, bug fixes, code reviews.

title: Custom Software Solutions
description: Full delivery of custom software: backend services, CLI tools, desktop apps, and automation utilities.

title: Backend API Development
description: REST APIs with authentication, database integrations, and clean routing. Ideal for MVPs and internal tools.
details: auth flows, schema design, API docs.

title: CLI Tools & System Utilities
description: Fast, reliable command-line tools for internal workflows, automation, and platform utilities.

title: Automated Bot Development
description: Custom bots for different platforms with database integration and command workflows.

title: Vibecoding Cleanup
description: I turn chaotic prototypes into maintainable code by cleaning up structure, naming, and project organization.

title: Minecraft Mod Development
description: Custom items, mechanics, and gameplay systems for modded clients. I help you design the feature set and deliver clean, documented builds.

title: Minecraft Plugin Development
description: Spigot/Paper server plugins for custom commands, moderation tools, economy systems, and gameplay enhancements.
details: commands, permissions, gameplay additions, custom idems

title: Video Editing
description: Quick-turn, dynamic editing for short-form and long-form content. I add motion, text, smooth transitions, and fun visuals to keep viewers engaged.

title: Thumbnail Creation
description: Eye-catching YouTube thumbnails designed to boost click-through rates. I create bold, colorful designs that stand out in feeds.
details: image cutouts, visual effects, text placement
